titleStmt.title: SII 22.166: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 166. (A.R. No. 166 of 1906) SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT, TIRUKKŌYILŪR TALUK, ELVĀNĀŚŪR. GRĀMĀRDHANĀTHA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME GŌPURA WALL, LEFT OF ENTRANCE. PAR. RĀJARĀJADĒVA (II)—6th YEAR (A.D. 1151-52)

summary.p: The inscription has the introduction Pūmaruviya Tirumādum etc. It records the gift of the taxes perumpāḍikāval, śiṟupāḍikāval, taṟiyiṟai, taṭṭārpāṭṭam, antarāyam and taraviniyōgam due from Parundal alias Malaiyavichchādiranallūr and other dēvadāna villages by the chief Āḷappiṟandāṉ Mōgaṉ alias Rājarājakāḍavarāyaṉ of Kūḍalūr, who had the title Nāludikkum-veṉṟāṉ, to the temple of Ūrbāgaṅkoṇḍaruḷiya-Mahādēva for the requirements of worship on the festival day of Tiruvōṇam in the month of Puraṭṭādi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmaruviya tirumātum puvimātum jayamātum nā
maruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayantupulka Arumaṟai vitineṟi
yanaittu n=taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cū
ṭi tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭait ticaikkaḷu ṟeṭṭu n=taṅku tanikkūṭa
n=tānena viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭṭiyaic ceṅko
l turappa poruṅkatirāḻi puvivaḷarntuṭanvara villava
riraṭṭar minavar ciṅkaṇar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇi
ya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpaka maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempon vira
siṅhāsanattu Avanimuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya
kopparakesaripatmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravarttikaḷ śrīrājarājadeva
ṟku yāṇṭu 6vatu malāṭāna jaṉanātavaḷanāṭṭup pānūṟkūṟṟattu bra
hmadeyam Iṟaiyānaraiyūrāna śrīcoḻakeraḷaccatu
rvetimaṅkalattu Ūrpākaṅkoṇṭaruḷiya mahādevaṟku kūṭa
lū rāḷappiṟan=tān mokanāna rājarājakkāṭavarāyanen Innā
yanār devatānam parun=talāna malaiyaviccātiranallūril Eṅkaḷ
peṟāna perumpāṭikāval ciṟupāṭikāval taṟiiṟai taṭṭā
rpāṭṭa man=tarāyam taraviniyokaṅkaḷu maṟṟu minnāyanār te
vatānaṅkaḷil En peṟāna perumpāṭikāval ciṟupāṭikāvalan=tarā
yam taraviniyokaṅkaḷum Epperpaṭṭa Elvait tevai ma
ṟṟum Innāyanāṟku Āṟāvatumutal puraṭṭāti tiruvoṇatti
runāḷeḻun=taruḷakkaṭavatākak kuṭuttuk kalveṭṭuvitten
kūṭalū rāḷappiṟan=tān mokanāna nālutikkum venṟa rājarā
jak kāṭavarāyanen Itdharmam Aḻivu ceyvār vallavarai
yan satyam taṅkaḷammaikkut tāne maṇavāḷan Itu cantrā
tityavat panmāheśvara rakṣai ....
puravuvari śrīkaraṇanāyakam Iḷaṅkuṭaiyā neḻuttu Ivai puravari tiṇaikkaḷa nāyakam pāraṇainallūr kiḻavaneḻuttu Ivai nikarilicoḻap pallava
rāyaneḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi nākaṅkoneḻuttu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi muḻainakaruṭaiyā neḻut
tu Ivai puravuvari śrīkaraṇattu mukaveṭṭi koṟṟamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ilāṭattaraya ṉeḻuttu Ivai rājarāja viḻupparaiya ṉeḻuttu
Ivai toṇṭaimā ṉeḻuttu Ivai vecālipperayaṉ Eḻuttu tirumantiraolai Irājentraciṅka muventaveḷāṉ Ivai kurukularāyaṉ
Eḻuttu Ivai nuḷamparāya(ṉ)eṉ Eḻuttu Ittilāṭi caṅkaradeva Inta malaiyanūrāṉa rājarājamaṅkalam Itu cantrātityavat panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 22.166 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
